summary: Closed, unmerged PR intended to match grInishie1_801FA9B4 to 100% by copying the _StageData structure pattern from grHeal. The main Inishie1 change modeled stage data as a wrapper struct containing StageData plus an OSReport format string, added adjacent globals for /GrI1.dat and grinishie1.c, and changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 to reference that data layout. The branch also contained grYorster and lbSnap matching rewrites from earlier commits; the author closed the PR to resubmit only the stage data fix.

key_files.role: Primary intended stage match. Added Inishie1 stage data globals and wrapper struct, rewired grInishie1_801FA9B4 global references, and adjusted one DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP call through a local.
Likely unrelated earlier matching tweak included in the branch; rewrote grYorster_80202428 loop, pointer comparison, and float accumulation temporaries.
Likely unrelated earlier matching tweak included in the branch; rewrote lbSnap_8001DF20 around descPtr and offset locals.

what_changed: Added s16 grI1_803E48C8[22], a stage block/index pattern table later cast to S16Vec3* in StageData.
Added char grI1_803E4944[] = "/GrI1.dat" and char grI1_803E49A8[] = "grinishie1.c".
Introduced typedef struct grInishie1_StageData containing StageData stage_data plus char report_fmt_get_gobj[0x24].
Initialized grI1_803E4950 with INISHIE1 stage metadata, the /GrI1.dat path, grI1_803E48C8 as stage coordinate data, count 7, and the get-gobj OSReport format string.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 to derive StageCallbacks through a byte-offset cast from grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c instead of directly indexing grI1_803E48F4.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 OSReport from inline string literals to grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj and grI1_803E49A8.
Changed grInishie1_801FBC4C to store gp->gv.inishie1.blocks[index].jobj2 in a local HSD_JObj* before DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP.
Also changed grYorster_80202428 to use a manual-increment loop, integer/pointer casts for item_gobj comparison, and a f32 newValue temporary.
Also changed lbSnap_8001DF20 to use a local descPtr to lbSnap_803BACC8 plus a separate offset variable before calling lb_8001C4A8.
smart_moves: The main matching insight was to compare against grHeal and copy its larger _StageData wrapper pattern instead of treating StageData as an isolated object.
Modeling the trailing OSReport format as part of grInishie1_StageData made the function reference the same global data layout the original binary likely used.
Separating /GrI1.dat, the report format, and grinishie1.c into named globals gave the compiler concrete symbols to load instead of emitting direct literal references.
The PR recognized that a function match can depend on nearby data layout and symbol adjacency, not only on the C control flow inside the function.
The author self-closed after noticing earlier commits were included, preserving a cleaner review path for a future stage-data-only submission.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, inspect similar already-matched stages when StageData or callback references look wrong; here grHeal provided the decisive _StageData shape.
When a function mismatch involves global address loads, verify the surrounding data declarations and rodata/data ordering before forcing more local code changes.
A stage-specific wrapper struct can preserve the common StageData prefix while accurately representing adjacent per-file data such as report strings.
Use casts and byte offsets only as evidence-driven matching tactics; document what object layout they are trying to recover because they can obscure normal typed relationships.
Keep decomp PRs narrowly scoped. This PR was closed because grYorster and lbSnap changes from earlier commits polluted a grInishie1-focused branch.
Because merged_at is null and there were no reviews, treat the exact code style as an unaccepted attempt unless a later successor PR confirms it.
naming_conventions: Inishie1 data symbols use the grI1_ address-style prefix, e.g. grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E48F4, grI1_803E4950.
The stage-specific wrapper type was named grInishie1_StageData, pairing the source module name with the StageData role.
The wrapper kept the common member name stage_data for the embedded StageData prefix and used the descriptive trailing member name report_fmt_get_gobj.
Stage function names follow the existing module-address convention, e.g. grInishie1_801FA9B4 and grYorster_80202428.
Local temporaries introduced for matching used purpose-oriented names such as jobj2, descPtr, offset, and newValue, but these were not reviewed as final naming.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used `(StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0` to make callback lookup depend on the contiguous data layout rather than a direct `&grI1_803E48F4[arg0]` expression.
Replaced inline OSReport literals with loads from global data: `grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj` and `grI1_803E49A8`.
Split a macro argument into `HSD_JObj* jobj2` before calling `DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP(jobj2)` to influence expression evaluation/register use.
In grYorster_80202428, used manual loop increment, an integer temporary read from the element pointer slot, u32 casts for comparison, and a f32 accumulation temporary to shape codegen.
In lbSnap_8001DF20, used a local descriptor pointer and separate offset variable to avoid repeated global accesses and alter assignment/call sequencing.
review_feedback: No formal reviews or review comments were present in the PR slice.
Author close comment: "Pushed some earlier commits, closing to submit just the stage data fix".
The only explicit process feedback is self-reported: isolate the grInishie1 stage data fix from unrelated grYorster and lbSnap matching changes.
The claimed 100% match for grInishie1_801FA9B4 comes from the PR body, but the PR was closed unmerged, so acceptance is unconfirmed.
follow_up_queries: Find the successor PR that resubmitted only the grInishie1 stage data fix after PR #2557.
Search for grHeal _StageData wrapper usage to compare the accepted struct layout pattern.
Check whether grI1_803E4950 and grInishie1_StageData were later merged with the same report_fmt_get_gobj layout.
Check whether the grYorster_80202428 and lbSnap_8001DF20 matching rewrites were resubmitted or accepted in separate PRs.
Audit other stage files where StageData may need a stage-specific wrapper carrying adjacent report strings or paths.
